title: Harness Definition
description: A harness definition describes one agent platform (harness) — its identity, installation paths, macros, and sidecar templates.

id.description: Canonical harness identifier (e.g., claude, codex, opencode)

name.description: Human-readable display name (e.g., Claude Code, Codex CLI)

version.description: Version of this harness definition (SemVer string)

frontmatter_mode.description: How the harness validates SKILL.md frontmatter: lenient (ignores unknowns, accepts spec fields), extended (accepts spec + platform-specific extras)

name_max_length.description: Maximum length for skill name field (default: 64, Codex: 100)

description_max_length.description: Maximum length for skill description field (spec: 1024, Codex: 500, Claude Code: 1536 combined with when_to_use)

supports_allowed_tools.description: Whether the harness recognizes the allowed-tools field (spec: experimental; Claude Code: fully supported with string, comma-separated, or YAML list format)

supports_disable_model_invocation.description: Whether the harness recognizes disable-model-invocation to hide from auto-load

supports_user_invocable_flag.description: Whether the harness recognizes user-invocable to hide from / menu

extra_metadata_path.description: Optional per-skill metadata file path relative to skill dir (e.g. agents/openai.yaml for Codex)

paths.description: Output path configuration for this harness

project_scope_path.description: Project-scoped skill output directory relative to project root (e.g., .claude/skills, .agents/skills, .opencode/skills, .pi/skills, .factory/skills)

user_scope_path.description: User-scoped skill output directory relative to home (e.g., ~/.claude/skills, ~/.codex/skills, ~/.config/opencode/skills, ~/.pi/agent/skills, ~/.factory/skills)

skill_filename.description: Skill file name (e.g., SKILL.md, skill.mdx for Factory, agent.md)

manifest_scope_path.description: Directory for plugin manifest relative to scope root (e.g., .claude for Claude plugin). Omit if harness has no manifest system.

manifest_filename.description: Plugin manifest filename (e.g., plugin.json, marketplace.json). Omit if harness has no manifest system.

macros.description: Named content blocks referenced by templates as {{ harness.<name> }}

oneOf.description: Macro with a body and optional list of arguments

functions.description: Custom template functions exposed to templates (e.g., skill_ref)

^[a-z][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$.description: Function definition with a signature description and optional inline template

sidecars.description: Sidecar file templates generated alongside each skill (zero or more)

output_dir.description: Relative directory within the skill output dir (defaults to .)

manifest.description: Optional plugin manifest template with platform-specific format

format.description: Which platform manifest format this template targets

template.description: Template string rendered with skill variables to produce the manifest entry

skill_ref_pattern.description: Pattern for referencing other skills (e.g., /{name}, {name}, /skill:{name}). {name} is replaced at runtime.

discovery.description: Discovery path support for this harness

project.description: Whether the harness discovers skills from project-scoped directories

user.description: Whether the harness discovers skills from user home-scoped directories

plugin.description: Whether the harness discovers skills from plugin/package-managed directories
